name: Noh-P.U.N.K. Foxy Tune
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ノウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ．Ｕ．Ｎ．Ｋ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パンク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フォクシー・チューン
desc: Once per turn, when this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can gain LP equal to that monster's original ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Noh-P.U.N.K. Foxy Tune" once per turn. You can Tribute 1 "P.U.N.K." monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; send 1 card from your hand to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "P.U.N.K." monster from your Deck, except a Level 8 monster.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, when this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can gain LP equal to that monster's original ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Noh-P.U.N.K. Foxy Tune" once per turn. You can Tribute 1 "P.U.N.K." monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; send 1 card from your hand to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "P.U.N.K." monster from your Deck, except a Level 8 monster.
eff: Once per turn, when this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can gain LP equal to that monster's original ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Noh-P.U.N.K. Foxy Tune" once per turn. You can Tribute 1 "P.U.N.K." monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; send 1 card from your hand to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "P.U.N.K." monster from your Deck, except a Level 8 monster.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
